name: Afton kids go shopping
description:
You can be a part of the Afton family, an oc, a background character or even the Karen!

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Aftons: Micheal is the oldest sibling (32) CC is the middle sibling (8) and Elizabeth is the youngest sibling (5)

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

This takes place after all of the Aftons passed and have been for decades. They are usually Illusion disks to look alive

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

William dislikes his children, Micheal is guilty for causing CC’s passing but moved through it, CC doesn’t fully forgive Micheal- but doesn’t hate him, Elizabeth has a neutral relationship with her family

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Yes, there will be a Karen. Maybe even two- OR THREE?! (Kidding I will add one, you can decide to add more

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Go wild and have fun :)
creator: Sleepy_boyyoyoy
